entries.scenario: Appended a reference to an undefined variable '__THIS_DOES_NOT_EXIST__'. Expected: NameError.
entries.error_message: Execution exceeded the sandbox time limit.
entries.root_cause: Execution exceeded the configured sandbox time limit — likely an infinite loop or blocking I/O.
entries.short_fix: Refactor loops to guarantee termination, or add an explicit iteration cap.

entries.ollama_enhanced: The error message is indicating that your code has been running for too long, exceeding the allowed time limit. This is likely due to an infinite loop or blocking I/O operation that's preventing your program from completing. To resolve this issue, refactor any loops to ensure they terminate properly or add a cap to prevent excessive iteration.
